# Jamsil Real Estate Agency

> Premium Real Estate Agency in Jamsil-dong, Songpa-gu, Seoul. Specializing in high-end apartments, commercial spaces, and officetels (studio apartments).

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://jamsil-realty.vercel.app/): Main landing page showing premium recommended listings in Jamsil (e.g., Jamsil Els, Ricenz, Pineapple Arcade) and introduction of the lead agent, Chulsoo Kim.
- [News & Notices](https://jamsil-realty.vercel.app/news): Bulletin board for the latest real estate updates, market trends, and notices.
- [Admin Dashboard](https://jamsil-realty.vercel.app/admin): Secure admin login page for managing posts and listing announcements.

## Target Properties & Area

- **Location**: Jamsil-dong, Songpa-gu, Seoul, South Korea
- **Key Properties**:
  - **Jamsil Els (L'S)**: 84m² Premium Apartment (Sale/Rent)
  - **Ricenz**: 59m² Renovated Apartment (Jeonse/Rent)
  - **Pineapple Arcade**: 42m² Commercial Shop near Sincheon Station (Monthly Rent)

## Technologies Used

- **Frontend**: Single-page-like static HTML/CSS (Tailwind CSS, Google Fonts, Material Symbols)
- **Data & Storage**: Hybrid local storage integrated with GitHub API for serverless data persistence
- **Hosting & Backend**: Vercel Serverless Functions (api/config.js for secure configuration delivery)
